steps.title: Separate the two sentences
steps.content: The first sentence ends after the parenthetical definition of endophytic fungi. The next idea begins with “By researching 120 endophytic fungi-produced compounds,” which introduces how Macías-Rubalcava reached her finding.

steps.title: Rule out faulty boundaries
steps.content: Choice B creates a comma splice between complete ideas. Choice C uses “and by” awkwardly and does not form a clean boundary. Choice D fuses the sentences with no punctuation.

steps.title: Choose the complete boundary
steps.content: The remaining choice ends the first sentence with a period after the parenthetical and starts a new sentence with “By researching.” The answer is A.
